design_philosophy.core_concept: Signal-First, Command-Second. A high-density, precise software-defined radio (SDR) and oscilloscope interface.
key_principles: Data Density over Whitespace: Utilize compact spacing for controls while dedicating maximum real estate to real-time visualizers.
Terminal Aesthetic: High contrast phosphor green and amber on deep obsidian black.
Asymmetric Dashboard: Non-standard, instrumentation-style layout instead of generic centered web cards.
Motion & Feedback: Instant visual feedback on signal thresholds via glowing indicators and pulsing elements.

rules: Readouts, metrics, WPM, and decoded text MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Labels and secondary text use IBM Plex Sans.

structure.container: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-2 p-2 md:p-4 bg-[#050505] min-h-screen
structure.main_visualizer: col-span-1 lg:col-span-8 row-span-2 border border-[#1A3324] bg-[#000000] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col
structure.side_controls: col-span-1 lg:col-span-4 border border-[#1A3324] bg-[#0A0A0A] p-4 flex flex-col gap-6
structure.bottom_decoder: col-span-1 lg:col-span-12 border border-[#1A3324] bg-[#0A0A0A] p-4 min-h-[150px] flex flex-col
structure.spacing: Tight padding (p-4 to p-6 inside panels) to mimic dense hardware controls.

surface_strategies.panels: Terminal Look. No rounded corners (rounded-none). 1px solid border in muted green. Background is pure black or very dark gray.
surface_strategies.canvas: Retro-Futurism. Add a CSS scanline overlay or subtle grain texture over the FFT and Waveform canvases. Canvas drawing should use green strokeStyle with shadowBlur for glow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Tactile Neo-Brutalist. Flat backgrounds. Hover state inverts colors (e.g., bg-green text-black).
surface_strategies.cards: Avoid Shadcn Card default styling (no white backgrounds, no rounded corners). Override to use dark flat panels with sharp edges.

controls.sliders: Use Shadcn Slider. Customize track to be thin bg-[#1A3324], thumb to be sharp/square bg-[#00FF66]. Use amber for threshold indicator if possible.
controls.buttons: Shadcn Button, squared off (rounded-none). Primary action (Start Capture) highly visible with bg-[#00FF66] text-[#050505].
controls.tabs: Shadcn Tabs, customized to look like hardware toggle switches or segmented controls. Active tab gets green bottom border.

indicators.tuning_lock: A small circular or square DOM element that glows bright green (shadow-[0_0_10px_#00FF66]) when signal crosses threshold.
indicators.wpm_display: Bold JetBrains Mono style readout with amber accent.

interactions_and_motion.live_data: Canvas must update via requestAnimationFrame for low latency. Use glowing stroke styles.
interactions_and_motion.threshold_cross: When signal crosses the threshold slider value, trigger a UI glow or change an indicator to amber.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Interactive elements invert or get a 1px bright green border.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react. Use technical icons (Activity, Mic, Upload, Copy, Radio, Settings). No emojis.

textures.name: Scanline CSS Overlay
textures.implementation: background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10; position: absolute; inset: 0;

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, inputs, buttons, WPM displays, and decoded text areas MUST have a descriptive kebab-case data-testid attribute (e.g., 'mic-start-btn', 'threshold-slider', 'decoded-text-output', 'copy-clipboard-btn', 'tuning-indicator').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React application without routing.
Use the Web Audio API (AudioContext, AnalyserNode, BiquadFilterNode) to capture mic or file audio.
Implement two separate canvas elements: one for FFT spectrum and one for time-domain waveform.
Implement signal processing for morse decoding: detect signal energy at the target pitch (narrow-band filter) crossing the threshold.
Include adjustable sliders for Target Pitch (Hz) and Threshold.
Display real-time WPM calculation and the live decoded text.
Apply the styling rules strictly: sharp edges (rounded-none), phosphor green/amber colors, JetBrains Mono font.
Add a CSS-based scanline effect absolute positioned over the canvas elements for the oscilloscope feel.
Ensure the layout mimics a dense SDR dashboard using Tailwind CSS Grid 'Control Room' mode.
Implement a 'copy to clipboard' button for the decoded morse text.
Ensure all components use standard HTML/Tailwind or heavily modified Shadcn UI tailored for the dark terminal aesthetic.
